members.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this member? Note: This will also delete all costume data for this member! This action cannot be undone.
members.confirm_archive: Are you sure you want to archive this member?
members.confirm_unarchive: Are you sure you want to unarchive this member?
members.confirm_move: Are you sure you want to move this member?
members.batch_add_placeholder:
Enter one member per line, format: Name,Role,Note
Example:
Player1,Master,Note1
Player2,Deputy,Note2
Player3,Member,Note3
members.guild_has_master: This guild already has a Master
members.guild_has_deputy: This guild already has a Deputy

costumes.confirm_delete_character: Are you sure you want to delete this character? Note: This will also delete all costume data under this character! This action cannot be undone.
costumes.confirm_delete_costume: Are you sure you want to delete this costume? This action cannot be undone.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.download_desc: Download core system data backup, including: apply mail, characters, costumes, guilds, member notes, members, archive history, and ghost records.
backup.download_raid_desc: Download raid-related data backup, including: guild raid records, member raid records, and raid seasons.
backup.restore_desc: Restore data from a previously downloaded JSON backup file. Note: This action will overwrite all existing data.
backup.restore_preview_desc: Please review the changes before executing the restore.
backup.no_tables_found: No valid tables found in the backup file.
backup.no_changes_desc: The database is already identical to the backup file.
backup.important_desc: The restore operation is irreversible. Before restoring, it is strongly recommended that you download the current data as a backup.
backup.restore_warning: The restore operation is irreversible. Before restoring, it is strongly recommended that you download the current data as a backup.
backup.backup_failed: Backup failed, please check console log for more information.
backup.restore_failed: Restore failed, please ensure the file format is correct.

tools.title: Tools
tools.confirm_auto_transfer: Are you sure you want to execute auto transfer?
tools.auto_transfer_desc: This function can be used to automatically process member data transfer.
tools.confirm_archive_not_in_list: Found {{count}} members not in the master list, are you sure you want to archive them?
tools.confirm_remove_duplicates: Are you sure you want to remove duplicate members? This action will delete members with the same name and no costume data in all guilds.
tools.remove_duplicates_desc: Automatically scan and remove duplicate members with the same name and no costume data in all guilds, keeping records with data.
tools.confirm_import_costumes: Are you sure you want to import the costume table?
tools.import_costumes_desc: Import costume table from existing spreadsheet.

passwords.single_update_desc: Suitable for resetting a single user's password.
passwords.bulk_update_desc: Suitable for regular full password resets, updating on a large scale via CSV.
passwords.not_logged_in: System detected you are not logged in, please log in again!
passwords.password_length: New password must be at least 6 characters
passwords.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match
passwords.no_guild_data: No guild data available for export
passwords.select_csv: Please select a CSV file first
passwords.csv_no_password: No new password data in CSV file, or missing username column
passwords.bulk_update_success: Batch processing complete! ✅ Success: {{success}}, ❌ Failed: {{fail}} (Error example: {{reason}})
passwords.download_list_desc: Click the button below to download the list containing all guild accounts, and fill in the new_password column in Excel.
passwords.upload_and_update_desc: Select the CSV file with new passwords filled in, the system will automatically filter empty passwords and perform batch updates.
passwords.note_1: Please ensure the CSV file has a username column, the system will use this as the basis for modification.
passwords.note_2: The system will only process rows where the new_password column has content.
passwords.note_3: The new password must be at least 6 characters long.
passwords.note_4: Batch updating may take some time, please be patient and wait for the result notification.

archived.title: Archived Members Management
archived.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this archived record? This action cannot be undone.
archived.unarchive_desc2: This will restore all costume proficiency data for this member.
archived.select_target_guild: Please select the target guild to move to

settings.bgm_hint: Please enter the full URL of the background music, supporting common formats like mp3.
settings.message_placeholder: Enter message to display on main page...
settings.bgm_url_help: Please enter the full URL of the background music, supporting common formats like mp3.

access.notice: Selected roles will be able to see the link in the header and access the page.
